name: Prince Kushwaha
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Passionate Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building scalable web applications and SaaS platforms. Proficient in React, Next.js, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure. Experienced in end-to-end development — from UI design to database architecture and server deployment on AWS and Hostinger VPS. Keen interest in Machine Learning and data-driven applications.

responsibilities: Designed and built the company website and multiple client-facing web platforms using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.
Developed RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express, integrated with MongoDB Atlas for data persistence.
set up and managed cloud infrastructure on AWS EC2 and S3, and Hostinger VPS with Nginx and PM2.
Implemented the RG Care NGO platform with donation workflows and lead capture forms.
Built the RG US Debt website targeting international audiences with optimized SEO and multi-language support.
Developed a Lead Management System (LMS) for internal CRM with role-based access control.
Collaborated with stakeholders to define requirements, design UI/UX, and deliver solutions iteratively.

experience.role: Machine Learning with Data Science Intern
responsibilities: Completed a 92-day intensive internship focused on Machine Learning and Data Science.
Worked on supervised and unsupervised learning models using Python, scikit-learn, and pandas.
Built and evaluated classification and regression pipelines on real-world datasets.
Developed data visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn to communicate insights.
